name: RadialBarChart
searchText: radialbarchart radial bar chart component @mantine/charts /charts/radial-bar-chart barsize data datakey emptybackgroundcolor endangle legendprops radialbarchartprops radialbarprops startangle tooltipprops withbackground withlabels withlegend withtooltip

props.name: barSize
props.description: Size of bars in px, 20 by default

props.name: dataKey
props.description: Key from data object to use as data key

props.name: emptyBackgroundColor
props.description: Color of the empty background, by default depends on the color scheme

props.name: legendProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts Legend component

props.name: radialBarChartProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts RadarChartChart component

props.name: radialBarProps
props.description: Props passed down to recharts RadialBar component

props.name: tooltipProps
props.description: Props passed down to Tooltip recharts component

props.name: withBackground
props.description: Determines whether empty bars area should be visible

props.name: withLabels
props.description: Determines whether labels should be displayed

props.name: withLegend
props.description: Determines whether the legend should be displayed

props.name: withTooltip
props.description: Determines whether the tooltip should be displayed when one of the bars is hovered
